remoteStories.studentLife.title: Student life stories
remoteStories.studentLife.description: Three longer learning stories about campus, the library, and a weekend trip.
remoteStories.studentLife.morning_campus: A student walks to the university, meets a friend, and hurries to the first class.
remoteStories.studentLife.library_projec: Two students prepare a project, look for books, and discuss their plan.
remoteStories.studentLife.weekend_trip.s: Friends travel to a nearby town, walk around, and return in the evening.
